titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the The Spinelli Archive: Oversize
titlestmt.author: by Maria Stella Cecchi

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 3906653.

PUBLIC "-//Yale University::Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library//TEXT (US::CtYBR::::[THE SPINELLI ARCHIVE: OVERSIZE ])//EN" "spinover.xml" converted from EAD 1.0 to 2002 by v1to02.xsl (sy2003-10-15).
Transformed with yale.addEadidUrl.xsl. Adds @url with handle for finding aid. Overwrites @url if already present.

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: The papers document the lives and careers of members of a prominent Florentine family, the Spinelli, and several related families.

userestrict.head: Ownership Copyright
userestrict.p: The Spinelli Archive: Oversize is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Cite As
prefercite.p: The Spinelli Archive: Oversize. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

accessrestrict.head: Information about Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

A limited number of items from the archive as a whole have been withheld and await conservation treatment and may not be available for use. These are referenced in the archive finding aids. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

scopecontent.head: Description of the Papers
scopecontent.p: Spinelli Archives. Over 100,000 documents dating from the fourteenth century to the eighteenth, from the palace archive of a Florentine family distinguished for their international banking and mercantile interests in the fifteenth century, their political activities in the city for several centuries, their patronage of religious institutions in Florence and Rome, and their association with the local silk guild. Included are the records of family members who served as papal bankers in the fifteenth century, ambassadors to the courts of Henry VIII and Charles V, churchmen, senators, and ducal employees. The collection documents social and family history, recording the day-to-day concerns of merchants, farmers, workmen, slaves, women, and children in thousands of wills, marriage contracts, personal diaries, family correspondence, grocery lists, household inventories, farm reports, tax statements, and business ledgers. In addition to the papers of the Spinelli family members, the Spinelli Archive also includes extensive documentation on the Baldocci, Guardi, Buonguglielmi and many other Florentine families.
For the purposes of cataloging and description, the Spinelli Archives has been divided into the following groups:

p.ref: The Spinelli Family Papers II & III

scopecontent.p: For each of these groups, a separate finding aid has been created. The entire collection, however, is classified as GEN MSS 109, with boxes and folders numbered sequentially through the archive.
Miscellaneous Material contains small groups of papers from related families, empty wrappers (the contents of which are assumed not to be present in the archive), and various other papers.
Parchments includes selected parchments from various parts of the archive, housed separately for preservation and descriptive purposes.
Addendum includes a small number of items acquired after the bulk of the archive had been received by the library and processing had commenced.
Oversize contains oversize materials from the archive, including numerous original wrappers, the contents of which are housed in the family groups.

did.unittitle: "Copia di Partite di denari pagati da Benedetto Spinelli per Ma. Milia Donna fu di Francesco Lapaccini..." 2pp.
"Copia delle Sostanze, e Beni del Sig. Guasparri Spinelli per la portata fatta ne 3 Aprile 1495" 4pp.
Drafts of genealogical charts, undated notes on family history, and a printed genealogical chart, the "Albero Genealogico de Signori Spinelli"
Loose material formerly laid in bound volume

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p: Includes drafts of genealogical charts of Spinelli and Bartolini Baldelli families, and description of the Spinelli chapel in S. Croce with epitaph of Tommaso Spinelli.

did.unittitle: "Decimarii, e Copia degl'effetti dei Sigri. della Fioraia, cioe Alberto, Francesco, Giovanni Battista, e Sandro fratelli, e figlioli d'Antonio di Simone di Piero della Fioraia..." 4pp.
Inventory of the goods of Simone della Fioraia. 2pp.
"Chopia di quelle portai nel chatasto 1469 per me Giovanni di Rinieri Peruzzi" 4pp.
"Decimario degli effetti del Rede di Giovanni di Rinieri Peruzzi" 4pp.
"Perdono concessa a Giovanni Peruzzi aver ammazzato Una persona" Genoa Regio Palatio.
"Inventario degl'Arredi Sacri della Chiesa di Rignalla a Prete Domenico Lambardi Rettore della detta chiesa consegnati l'anno 1572..." 4pp.
"Scomunica contro Nanni di Michele del Popolo di San Stefano a Ugnano per quello era debitore del Sig. Canonico Leonardo di Guasparri Spinelli" 2pp. Notary: Benedictus Mattei.
"Nota di diverse Gioie, Abiti, e loro Valuta, e nota di debitori fra il Sig. Piero, e Ser Leonardo Spinelli" and inventory and valuation. 4pp.
"Copie di Partite di Conti fra il Sig. Tommaso Spinelli, e Monache del Ceppo per le Robe...per il Vitto del Sigra. Margherita sua figliola" (1587-1598)
"Convenzioni di Benedetto, e Giovanni Battista di Tommaso Spinelli con Neri Loro fratello di pagargli S. 72 L'anno nel tempo della di Lui assenza per L'Eredità paterna"
"Inventario delle Robe, e Masserizzie di Casa consegnata a Ser Domenico Lambardi, Rettore della Chiesa di Rignalla" 4pp.

"Quietanza riceuta di Leonardo Doffi Procuratore del Sig. Tommaso Spinelli e Borromeo Borromei a Monsig. Alfonso Cariglio Arcivescovo di Toledo..." Notary: Alfonsus Didactus de Cordoba. Toletanus (Toledo).
"Bilancio del S. Tommaso Spinelli col S. Galeazzo Borromei" 2pp.
"Bilancio di Dare, et Avere del Sig. Tommaso Spinelli..." 4pp.
"Bilancio fra il Sig. Alessandro Borromei, e Sig. Tommaso Spinelli" 2pp.
"Bilancio di Ventura Borromei di Dare, et Avere..." 2pp.
"Copia di Partite cavate dal Libro Bianco..." 4pp.
"Bilancio del Rede del Sig. Tommaso Spinelli" 4pp.
"Copie di Partite attenenti all'Erede del S. Tommaso Spinelli" 4pp.
"Bilancio di Dare, et Avere del Sig. Guasparri Spinelli" 2pp.
"Partite del Conto...con Agnolo Adriani di Pisa"
"Tabula diuinorum officiorum a dominica prima post Pentecosten usq[ue] ad aduentum M.CCCC." Printed broadside. 2pp.
Account pages concerning Casanuova and Mulinaccio. 8pp.
"Copie di Partite di Conti del Sig. Leonardo di Guasparri Spinelli..." 12pp.
"Partite di Dare et Avere tra il Sig. Canonico Leonardo Spinelli e Benedetto Spinelli" 4pp.
"Indice dell'Archivio Spinelli, compresi i Documenti Vasari. Parte Prima" 1 item, bound in vellum.
Wrapper title: "Albero degli Spinelli, e de Bisarnesi, e di Beccaparole Loro Consorti..."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p: Armorial book, with history of the early Spinelli by Giovanni Vincenzio Fantoni and genealogical charts by Pier'Lorenzo Maria Mariani. Also contains a later draft chart that carries the family down to 1801.

did.unittitle: Wrapper title: "Spoglio della Serie de'documenti, e notizie sulle quali si e disteso l'Albero generale della Famiglia degli Spinelli, Bisarnesi, e Beccaparole..."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p: Volume containing list of references to the Spinelli family compiled by Antonio Maria Fantacci. The list ends with entries for 1680-1700.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p: Includes drafts of genealogical charts of Spinelli and Bartolini Baldelli families, and description of the Spinelli chapel in S. Croce with epitaph of Tommaso Spinelli. [For the above items, see: Oversize folder 8934a]

did.unittitle: Wrapper title: "Due stracciafogli di Ricordi di Tommaso di Benedetto Spinelli per il Negozio di Seta dal 1551 al 1560" 2 items. 188pp.
Wrapper title: "Stracciafoglio [di Tommaso di Benedetto] Spinelli per il Negozio di Seta del Salucci dal 1561 al 1563" 1 item, bound in vellum leaf with decorated initial. 112pp.
Wrapper title: "Debitori, e Creditori di Neri Spinelli Per Mercatura dal 1611 al 1618" 1 item, bound in vellum.
"Entrata e Uscita di Tommaso di Benedetto Spinelli per Conto della Tesoreria d'Ascoli del 1550 e 1551" 1 item, bound in vellum. 296pp.

"Instrumento...per il quale i Frati di S. Agostino sono obbligati a pagare agli Eredi di Filippo di Pacino Peruzzi, e Gherardo Gentili...e detto Contratto è fatto a tempo di S. Tommaso da Villa Nuova" Parchment. Notaries: Philippus Andreae Gualterotti and Jacobus Audeberti
"Vendita d'un Casolare con alcune terre, che fa Piero Biliotti a Berto Lapacci Luogo posto alla Pieve a Settimo nominato Farneti..." Parchment. Notary: Johannes Bonaccursi de Passerinis.
"Compromesso e Lodo di Zenobio Pieri, e Bartolomeo Conti per le differenze fra Giovanni e Rinieri Peruzzi..." Notary: Jacobus Michaelis Bennichase.
"Faro qui ricordo...in casa di... Lavoratore di Luigi da Chastiglione..." Ricordo of Tommaso Spinelli concerning a birth of Siamese twins.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p: [The contents of these wrappers are filed in the corresponding section of The Spinelli Archive]
